summary: Iter 30 — Mobile responsive shell + Watch Together TV-show episode picker + LiveTVBoot skip auto-focus + Detail.jsx series-party autoplay. ALL features verified via Playwright e2e on the preview pod. Backend regression: 16/16 watch_party + 18/18 backup + 10/11 sportsdb_v9 = 44/45 pass. The 1 sportsdb failure (test_b_event_normalised_fields — events missing 'statusShort'/'state'/'live' fields) is PRE-EXISTING and unrelated to this iteration (watch_party.py was untouched per the brief; the host's pick payload carries extra opaque fields).

minor.issue: test_b_event_normalised_fields — events missing fields ['statusShort','state','live']. Pre-existing — NOT caused by this iter's mobile/watch-together changes. Iter29 showed 11/11 pass; suggests sportsdb provider response shape changed OR a recent code edit dropped those normalised fields.

action_items: Investigate /api/sportsdb fixtures: missing statusShort/state/live in normalised event shape. Compare with iter29 output. Likely a tiny field-mapping miss in the fixtures merger (NOT a regression from this fork's changes).
critical_code_review_comments: MobileBottomNav.jsx: clean component, 5 tabs with correct routes (/, /sports, /live-tv, /library, /settings), data-testid present on all 5 (mobile-nav-{label}). Active accent #5DC8FF. 44px tap targets via 58px height. Good.
useIsMobile.js: detection correctly combines coarse-pointer + width<900 AND honours ?mobile=1/?mobile=0 URL override. Subscribed to resize + orientationchange. Good.
App.js:135-148 MobilePlatformRoot: sets data-platform='mobile' on body AND documentElement on mount, removes on unmount. Conditionally renders MobileBottomNav based on route. Good.

WatchTogether.jsx:557-568 — MoviePicker correctly branches: if pendingShow is set (TV result picked), renders EpisodePicker; otherwise renders search results. Movies skip episode picker entirely (per brief).

WatchTogether.jsx:801-808 handlePickEpisode spreads {...show} (which carries tmdb_id, media_type='tv', title, poster, year) and ADDS imdb_id, season, episode, episode_title. CONFIRMED VIA RUNTIME WS CAPTURE: pick payload contains all 9 fields {tmdb_id:'1396', media_type:'tv', title:'Breaking Bad', poster:..., year:'2008', season:1, episode:1, episode_title:'Pilot', imdb_id:'tt0903747'}.

WatchTogether.jsx:103-104 navigate URL for series correctly: `/title/series/${target.imdb_id}?party=CODE&autoplay=1&at_ms=X&position_ms=Y&season=S&episode=E`. Members route through Detail.jsx (NOT manual episode picker).
Detail.jsx:84-88,372-410 — series-party autoplay useEffect reads partySeason/partyEpisode from URL, fetches stream for `${id}:${S}:${E}` videoId, passes episodeOverride to playStream. Good.
Detail.jsx:412-492 playStream now accepts episodeOverride with cwId/season/episode/title for correct routing and CW persistence. Good.

LiveTVBoot.jsx:239-263 SkipButton uses 3 staggered focus attempts (0/80/240ms) once `show` flips true at 10s, sets data-focused='true', and handles Enter/Space via onKeyDown. Correct — survives spatial-nav re-focus races.

MINOR — index.css mobile overrides are extensive (~200 lines keyed off body[data-platform='mobile']). Works well but watch for selector specificity drift as new components ship — e.g. hardcoded paths like `.max-w-\[60vw\]` will silently stop matching if Tailwind class changes.

success_rate.backend: 98% (44/45 — 1 pre-existing sportsdb fixture-shape failure unrelated to this iter)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — Mobile shell (390x844), TV regression (1920x1080), Watch Together TV-show episode picker + pick-payload all 9 fields, preview transition — ALL PASS

test_credentials: None. Seeded profile via add_init_script: onnowtv-profiles-v1 + onnowtv-active-profile-v1='p1'.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral profile in localStorage only. Watch party rooms are server-side ephemeral (auto-expire); no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TVKeyboard search input does NOT respond to page.keyboard.type — must click on-screen buttons. CRITICAL selector gotcha: search-result testids use item.type which is 'series' or 'movie' (NOT 'tv'/'movie'). Correct selector for TV-show results is `[data-testid^="party-pick-series-"]`. The /api/tmdb/search?q=breaking%20bad returns 13 results with 4 being type='series' (Breaking Bad tmdb_id=1396 is index 0). Episode-picker testids: `watch-together-season-{N}` and `watch-together-episode-{S}-{E}`. WS capture for verifying pick payload: `page.on('websocket', ...)`+ `ws.on('framesent', ...)` to access JSON. The watch-party WS endpoint is `wss://.../api/watch-party/ws/{CODE}`. For mobile mode: use ?mobile=1 URL override OR set viewport <900px + emulate touch (viewport alone is NOT enough because useIsMobile requires hasTouch).
rca of the issue: Sportsdb fixtures regression: event objects returned by /api/sportsdb/fixtures merger are missing 'statusShort', 'state', 'live' fields. This iter did NOT touch backend/server.py per the brief, so the issue likely existed before this fork OR a different recent commit changed the espn/sportsdb normaliser. Reproduction: `curl $REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/sportsdb/fixtures` and inspect the first event's keys. Mitigation: add the 3 missing field aliases in the normaliser (likely in the espn/sportsdb merger in backend/server.py).
